name: keep_attribute_on_memory_array
description: Code should include the (* keep *) attribute directly on a memory array declaration to prevent optimization passes from removing or merging the memory.

name: keep_attribute_on_module_instance
description: Code should include the (* keep=1 *) attribute on a module instance to prevent optimization passes from eliminating or merging the instantiated module.

name: memory_nomap_before_opt
description: Code should include memory -nomap followed by opt -full to preserve memory structures while allowing other optimizations, testing whether keep attributes are respected.
